x-enumeration-literals.name: Fixed Billing Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Billing uses a constant predefined amount, independent of usage or behavior.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Usage-Based Billing Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Billing is calculated based on the quantity of services consumed (e.g., number of transactions, volume, or frequency).

x-enumeration-literals.name: Threshold-Based Billing Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Billing applies only when usage exceeds a defined limit; charges may start after a free allowance.

x-enumeration-literals.name: Tiered Billing Method
x-enumeration-literals.description: Billing is calculated using progressive price levels, where different usage ranges are charged at different rates.
